steps.title: Identify the task requirement
steps.content: The student must make and support a generalization about the effect of redesigning—this means the answer needs both a broad claim about what redesigning accomplishes and evidence to back it up.

steps.title: Identify the match
steps.content: D opens with a generalization about what redesigning can achieve—create a meaningful symbol of civic pride—and supports it with Pocatello's redesign plus relevant details about what its new flag represents. The other three either present facts without generalizing about effect (A, B) or narrate Pocatello's redesign without making a broader claim about what it achieved (C). This matches choice D — D is correct.
